compiled_state.title: Create dso:ui-designer agent definition
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Testing mode: GREEN. File: plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md.

Create agent definition that makes tests 1+2+5+6 GREEN (contract doc from prior task makes 3+4 GREEN).

Requirements:
YAML frontmatter: name: ui-designer, model: sonnet, non-empty description
Body must:
- Reference ui-designer-return-payload.md for return payload schema
- Define CACHE_MISSING detection: when UI discovery cache is absent or stale, return CACHE_MISSING status with actionable caller instructions
- Define scope-split proposal emission: when pragmatic scope splitter triggers, include scope_splits array in return payload
- Call resolve-stack-adapter.sh for stack-agnostic component discovery
- Support Lite track (<=2 components) and Full track

Handles design creation logic from current design-wireframe Phases 1-4 and 6: component discovery, spatial layout tree, SVG blueprint, token overlay, manifest.

Acceptance criteria:
1. File exists at plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md
2. Frontmatter name=ui-designer, model=sonnet, description non-empty
3. Body references ui-designer-return-payload.md
4. Body defines CACHE_MISSING detection and response behavior
5. Body defines scope-split proposal emission in return payload
6. Universal: bash tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh exits 0

Verify:
  bash tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh 2>&1 | grep -cE '\.\.\. PASS$' | awk '{exit ($1 >= 6) ? 0 : 1}' && echo 6 of 7 tests passing
